analysis.confidence_interval: paired normal interval over split-group cluster means
analysis.failure_analysis: retain every failure code and up to 20 stable question-ID examples per system/code
analysis.macro_reporting: report complete overall results plus persona, story role, operation, challenge, risk, difficulty, locale, jurisdiction, split, discovery stage and answerability slices
analysis.multiplicity: Bonferroni simultaneous confidence intervals across every proposal/comparator/metric pair
analysis.variance_unit: split_group (the frozen canonical anchor shared by 100 correlated matrix cells)

claim_boundaries: The automated run evaluates metadata discovery, ranking, typed relationship exposure, citation/provenance and answerability classification.
Substantive body-content answering remains a separate authoritative-source retrieval stage.
No human effectiveness, accessibility, comprehension, preference or UI-of-choice claim can be inferred from this run.

execution.implementation: Python standard library plus SQLite FTS5

gold_relevance.unanswerable_retrieval_metrics: excluded; answerability and abstention are scored separately

matched_conditions: Every system receives the same wording, independently verified gold, frozen bundle snapshot, result limit and deterministic grader. No system receives expected_unanswerable or gold fields as query input.

measurement_definitions.bytes_read: UTF-8 bytes of the query plus record and relationship payloads materialised from SQLite for that question; this is a stable logical-I/O measure, not operating-system physical I/O.
measurement_definitions.latency: Observed monotonic wall-clock nanoseconds for answerability classification, retrieval, graph expansion and citation construction; host variation is reported rather than hashed away.
measurement_definitions.query_steps: Deterministic classifier, retrieval and optional graph/typed-edge stages executed.
measurement_definitions.shards_read: Distinct publication record or relationship shard identifiers represented in materialised rows.
measurement_definitions.tool_calls: SQLite exact/FTS, edge or graph queries issued by the discovery adapter.

systems.treatment: typed FTS, inferred labels where published, graph traversal, lifecycle/provenance signals and deterministic unsupported-premise abstention
exact visible title or canonical URL lookup
title, description and URL FTS only
source-native typed fields and provenance, graph disabled
proposal with trust ranking and evidence/lifecycle output hidden
proposal restricted to the most prevalent frozen source membership
proposal excluding inferred enrichment fields and inferred assertions
canonical index after YAML-LD conversion and expansion
